sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1492" key="a(droke/falos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁδρο-κέφαλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1492.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with large head</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.63</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.74</biblScope> </bibl>; sens. obsc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> </bibl> <pb n="25" TEIform="pb"/> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Facet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">251</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
